'''''Silencer-7''''' was a [[World Devastator]] serving the resurgent [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] of [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].

==History==
''Silencer-7'' was the lead World Devastator that [[Battle of Calamari|attacked]] the water [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] when [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] returned in a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] body. During the battle, where it destroyed ''[[Mon Remonda]]'' and ''[[Emancipator]]'', it was captained by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Titus Klev]].<ref name="DE" />

''Silencer-7'' was the largest and most powerful of the World Devastators, reaching a tonnage that put it in [[dreadnought]] class within the [[Anaxes War College System/Legends|Anaxes War College System]] of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] classifications.<ref name="TEGTW" />
The vessel was eventually destroyed when the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] sabotaged the squad of Devastators, causing them to collide with one another.<ref name="DE" />

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]] {{1st}}
